Structs/AndConstraint.html.name: AndConstraint
Structs/AndConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to check if all of the child constraints are valid or not.

Structs/BlankConstraint.html.name: BlankConstraint
Structs/BlankConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is blank.

Structs/EmailConstraint.html.name: EmailConstraint
Structs/EmailConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is a valid email address.

Structs/IPConstraint.html.name: IPConstraint
Structs/IPConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is a valid IP address.

Structs/IntegerConstraint.html.name: IntegerConstraint
Structs/IntegerConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is an integer number.

Structs/JSONConstraint.html.name: JSONConstraint
Structs/JSONConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is a JSON string.

Structs/LengthConstraint.html.name: LengthConstraint
Structs/LengthConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is with a valid length.

Structs/NotBlankConstraint.html.name: NotBlankConstraint
Structs/NotBlankConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is not blank.

Structs/OrConstraint.html.name: OrConstraint
Structs/OrConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to check if at least one of the child constraints is valid or not.

Structs/RegexConstraint.html.name: RegexConstraint
Structs/RegexConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is a regular expression.

Structs/URLConstraint.html.name: URLConstraint
Structs/URLConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is URL.

Structs/UUIDConstraint.html.name: UUIDConstraint
Structs/UUIDConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is UUID.

Structs/VINConstraint.html.name: VINConstraint
Structs/VINConstraint.html.abstract: A constraint to validate if a value is a valid VIN.

Structs/ConstraintViolation.html.name: ConstraintViolation
Structs/ConstraintViolation.html.abstract: A common error type to throw by ConstraintValidator for an invalid value.

Structs/Group.html.name: Group
Structs/Group.html.abstract: A validation group is used to group constraints and apply validation based on validation groups provided by Validator.
